dict.string: $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE)
MySIS
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
mysis
APPL
$(FLUTTER_BUILD_NAME)
$(FLUTTER_BUILD_NUMBER)
MySIS requires permission to access your phone camera to take pictures while marking attendance and Changing Profile Image.
MySIS requires permission to access your phone contacts to allow phone calls to be made through the links provided in the application.
MySIS use Face ID to secure your app data.
MySIS need Touch ID/Face ID to authenticate you.
MySIS uses location data in the background to verify your attendance and duty location even when the app is not actively open.
MySIS uses location data to verify the location from which Attendance is being marked and while on Duty. Permission is required while the app is in use.
MySIS requires access to the microphone to record audio for certain features.
MySIS need permission to save files to your device.
MySIS need access to your photo library to save the downloaded PDF.
We use notifications to keep you updated.
LaunchScreen
Main
